ValidationRule.description: To Check Entity is Inactive when Drawdown is approved.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.Name = "Drawdown", !$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, NOT( ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Status__c), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Status__c), 'Pending'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Status__c,'Open for Payment Studio'), leaseworks__AccEnabled__c, leaseworks__Entity_New__r.leaseworks__Inactive__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Unable to update the Drawdown status to 'Cash Received' since the entity associated with the Drawdown is inactive. Please link it to an active entity to proceed.
